heading: Transfer of priorities
label: 2333 Transfer of priorities
notes: Transfer of FunctionsAtomic Energy Commission abolished and functions transferred by sections 5814 and 5841 of this title. See also Transfer of Functions notes set out under those sections.

children.label: a
children.text: a husband and wife may exercise a priority in their joint names;

children.label: b
children.text: a religious organization may exercise the priority which would otherwise belong to its priest, minister, or rabbi, regardless of whether that position happens to be filled at the time of the exercise of the priority;

children.label: c
children.text: two or more priority holders having a common interest in a building or location may assign their interests to a single assignee; and

children.label: d
children.text: the Commission may permit such other transfers as it finds to be fair and equitable.
